name: Kory Mitchell
phrase_preferences: spend most of my time with
cta_style: single direct question, low pressure, specific

style_exemplars.exemplar: I run IFG and spend most of my time with blue-collar founders thinking about growth and exit timing.
I am Kory Mitchell. I built my career in blue-collar businesses and now advise founders through IFG on growth and eventual exits.
We help them tighten operations and narrative before they ever go to market.
